reviews.comment:
Baños súper limpios, me tocó cambiar a mi bebé y estaba impecable el cambiador y el baño.
Y después compramos comidas calientes, destacable la atención de Luca,  muy amable con la locura de los chicos.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were spotless; I had to change my baby there, and the changing table and bathroom were immaculate.

Afterwards, we bought hot meals. Luca's service was outstanding; he was very kind and gentle with the kids.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaWMtTmtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar está bueno para parar un rato, las bebidas calientes porque tienen las heladeras pasillo y se ve que no funcionaban bien, cuando viajas en verano con 35 grados es crucial que haya bebida fría. La atención del shop de mala, tirando a pésima. La carga de agua 100 pesos, y encima hay que entrar a comprar la ficha, y hacer toda la cola por una ficha a valor exorbitante. Pare en la próxima ypf y cargue gratis.

(Translated by Google)
The place is okay for a quick stop, but the drinks are warm because the aisle refrigerators weren't working properly. When you're traveling in the summer with 35-degree heat, it's crucial to have cold drinks. The service at the convenience store is bad, bordering on terrible. A water refill costs 100 pesos, and on top of that, you have to go inside to buy a token and wait in line for one at an exorbitant price. Stop at the next YPF station and fill up for free.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaWVXUDJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es muy lindo el lugar, los baños muy limpios, pero comer allí es muy caro más teniendo en cuenta que sos socia

(Translated by Google)
The place is very nice, the bathrooms are very clean, but eating there is very expensive, especially considering you're a member.

reviews.comment:
Es hermoso el lugar.. siempre paramos ahí cuando vamos a mar del plata. Tiene bastante espacio para autos y un gran bosque para caminar. También tiene baños limpios.
Pero hay cosas negativas;
1) la comida no es barata
2)no hay muchas opciones veganas de comida. Siempre ponen 1 y después la sacan, despues vuelven a poner.. deberían tener medallones frizzados y listo!

(Translated by Google)
It's a beautiful place. We always stop there when we go to Mar del Plata. It has plenty of space for cars and a large forest to walk through. It also has clean bathrooms.
But there are some downsides:
1) the food isn't cheap.
2) there aren't many vegan food options. They always put one out, then take it out, then put it back in... they should have frozen medallions and that's it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbW8teDFRRRAB
